mnemonics: Ethereum Classic is the 'Classic' car: it's the original chain that didn't get a new engine (The DAO bailout). Ethereum is the upgraded, forked car.
keyPoints: ETH is the cryptocurrency of the Ethereum blockchain after the hard fork.
ETC is the cryptocurrency of the original, unaltered Ethereum blockchain (Ethereum Classic).
The split occurred in 2016 due to a philosophical disagreement over reversing transactions after The DAO hack.
commonMistakes: Thinking ETH and ETC are the same or interchangeable. They are separate assets on separate chains.
Believing ETC is a 'testnet' or newer version of ETH. It is the original chain.
